creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 191878
py-django-filter-1.1.0.shar

Hello,

attached is the shar archive for the Python package py-django-filter, a generic system for filtering Django QuerySets based on user selections.

Note:
I've ported the stable version 1.1.0 instead of the development version 2.2.0. The first one is still compatible with Python v2.7

QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.1-RELEASE amd64 + i386) for each py27 + py36 flavor -> OK
- portlint -> OK

--
Cheers
Kai
